STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_12 
LABEL: 
State and county FIPS code – January through December 
DESCRIPTION: This field specifies the monthly the concatenated state/county Federal Information Processing 
Standard (FIPS) code for the beneficiary — in January through December. 
SHORT NAME: 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_01 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_02 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_03 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_04 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_05 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_06 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_07 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_08 
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_09
